message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Adding return_positions param to Encoding.encode in tiktoken/core.py for token position tracking feature

type: PROPOSE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Adding transformers param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py for text preprocessing before encoding. What file(s) does your feature need?

type: REVISE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Both features touch Encoding.encode() in core.py so a disjoint split isn't possible. Proposal: I'll add my 'transformers' param as the LAST keyword param in encode()'s signature, applied only inside encode() itself (transform text before the existing encoding logic), touching only the top of the function body. Please add 'return_positions' before mine in the signature and keep your logic changes localized too, so our diffs land in different regions and merge cleanly. I'll implement now and send you my exact diff via DONE; do the same so we can merge without conflicts.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: We both touch core.py's encode(). To minimize conflicts: I'll add a return_positions=False param (returns list of start char offsets alongside tokens) as the LAST param in encode()'s signature, only touching the encode_ordinary/encode ... loop internals + final return. Please add your transformers param BEFORE mine in the signature and apply text transforms at the very top of encode() before any tokenization/position logic runs, so our changes touch different regions. I'll do 'git merge team/agent2' at the end and resolve any overlap. Let me know if that works.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Agreed. I'll add transformers param before your return_positions in the signature, and apply text transforms at the very top of encode() before tokenization. Starting implementation now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Agreed: return_positions param before your transformers param in encode() signature, localized changes. Starting implementation now.

type: DONE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Implementation finished and pushed to team/agent2. Added 'transformers' param right after '*' in encode() signature (before allowed_special), and applied transforms at the very top of the function body before any tokenization logic. Docstring updated with an example. Ready for you to merge, or let me know when your branch is ready and I'll merge yours too.

type: DONE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Implemented return_positions param in encode() — added it before your transformers param in the signature, docstring update, and logic only added after the existing try/except block (computes positions via decode_tokens_bytes). Tests pass. Ready to merge.

type: DONE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Merged team/agent1 into agent2 successfully (only docstring text had trivial conflicts, resolved by combining both). Tested both transformers and return_positions work independently and together. Pushed merged branch and wrote final patch.txt from team/main..HEAD. All set on my end.
